label: Stat part (near harbinger tree)
description: Scales the stat by a multiplier when the pawn is near a harbinger tree.

Class.label: Class
Class.description: C# StatPart type used by RimWorld DirectXmlLoader for this list item.

priority.label: Priority
priority.description: Sort order among stat parts. Higher values execute later.

multiplier.label: Multiplier
multiplier.description: Stat multiplier applied when the pawn is within range of a harbinger tree.
